judge_reason: Description A describes a boomerang/delta wing intersecting a sphere, while Description B describes a flying saucer with an oval over a disk; these are clearly different visual objects.
original_image_tags: A stylized black-and-white logo featuring a sharp, angular shape resembling a boomerang or delta wing intersecting a textured sphere, set against a plain background.
gpt_mini_desc: *Image: A scanned typed letter on Inter-Continental Aerial Research Foundation letterhead with a circular logo and handwritten annotations, including the typed address “Missouri Filter Center, Robert T. Stone, Director, 10717 E. 27th Terr., Independence, Missouri.”*
